name: Yang Min
page_title: Yang Min 楊敏 [Shu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: Heavily criticized Jiang Wan but later saved by Jiang Wan’s leniency.

	 Wade-Giles 
	Yang Min
sections.biography-source-undefined:
Yang Min was an official who served Shu.

Yang Min once severely criticized Jiang Wan and called him inferior to Zhuge Liang saying, “You handle affairs in a sloppy manner. You truly cannot compare to your predecessor.” As a result, many people got enraged at him and one went so far as to request for him to be interrogated and punished. Jiang Wan resisted, saying, “I am indeed not like my predecessor. There is nothing to interrogate him upon.” The person repeated himself but while listened to, Jiang Wan refused to interrogate Yang Min. Later, Yang Min was incriminated in an unspecified severe crime and was imprisoned. Many people thought he would die, but Jiang Wan was lenient and let Yang Min avoid a severe punishment.

full_text:
Yang Min 楊敏
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Min (楊敏). Heavily criticized Jiang Wan but later saved by Jiang Wan’s leniency. Yang Min was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.

Yang Min was an official who served Shu.
Yang Min once severely criticized Jiang Wan and called him inferior to Zhuge Liang saying, “You handle affairs in a sloppy manner. You truly cannot compare to your predecessor.” As a result, many people got enraged at him and one went so far as to request for him to be interrogated and punished. Jiang Wan resisted, saying, “I am indeed not like my predecessor. There is nothing to interrogate him upon.” The person repeated himself but while listened to, Jiang Wan refused to interrogate Yang Min. Later, Yang Min was incriminated in an unspecified severe crime and was imprisoned. Many people thought he would die, but Jiang Wan was lenient and let Yang Min avoid a severe punishment.
